description: Enhance spending caps, trust score, undo engine, and marketplace for Phase 21 requirements. Add per-task and tokens-per-hour limits. Extend trust score with auto-pause. Extend undo to 24h TTL with cross-app mutation recording. Marketplace gets VM2-style sandbox isolation with signature verification.
steps: Enhance packages/agent-runtime/src/spending-limit.ts: Add perTaskCap and tokensPerHourCap to SpendingLimitConfig schema. Add recordTokenUsage(tokens: number) method. Add canSpendTokens(tokens: number) check. Add hard kill on breach: when any cap is exceeded, throw SpendingCapBreachedError and emit a kill-switch activation for that agent. Update SpendingLimitConfigSchema with new zod fields.

Enhance packages/agent-runtime/src/trust-score.ts: Add AUTO_PAUSE_THRESHOLD constant (score <= 15). Add isPaused() method that returns true when score drops below threshold. Add getPauseReason() returning why agent was paused. Add requiresReview() returning true when score is between 15-25 (review zone). Integrate with KillSwitch: when score drops below threshold, call KillSwitch to halt the agent.

Enhance packages/agent-runtime/src/undo-engine.ts: Change DEFAULT_TTL_MS from 5 minutes to 24 hours (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000). Add metadata to UndoAction: {agentId, app, description, affectedResources: string[]}. Add getUndoableByAgent(agentId) method. Add getUndoableByApp(app) method. Add undoAll(agentId) for batch revert. Add mutation recording: registerMutation(id, agentId, app, description, affectedResources, undoFn).

Enhance packages/agent-runtime/src/marketplace/installer.ts: Add signature verification: verifySignature(spec, signature, publicKey) method that checks agent spec integrity. Add VM2-style sandbox isolation: add isolationLevel field to InstalledAgent ('vm2' | 'process' | 'none'). Add SecurityAudit interface {passed: boolean, findings: string[], reviewedAt: number}. Add requiresReview flag that must be true before an agent can be promoted from sandbox. Add env access test: blockEnvAccess() method that wraps agent execution and intercepts process.env reads.
Update packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/spending-limit.test.ts with tests for per-task cap, tokens-per-hour, and hard kill on breach.
Update packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/trust-score.test.ts with tests for auto-pause threshold and review zone.
Update packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/undo-engine.test.ts with tests for 24h TTL, mutation recording, batch revert, and agent/app filtering.
Create packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/marketplace/installer.test.ts (or update existing) with tests for signature verification, isolation level, env access blocking.
Update packages/agent-runtime/src/index.ts exports for any new types/interfaces.
acceptance_criteria: SpendingLimit enforces per-task and tokens-per-hour caps with hard kill on breach
TrustScore auto-pauses agents below threshold and integrates with KillSwitch
UndoEngine has 24h TTL and supports cross-app mutation recording with batch revert
Marketplace installer verifies signatures and provides VM2-style isolation metadata
Sandbox escape test: blockEnvAccess() method exists that prevents process.env reads
All new and updated tests pass
